rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION To Consolidate Actions For All Purposes Including Trial
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, June 26, 2009, line 1, PLAINTIFF JOSEPH BEST MOTION To Consolidate Actions For All Purposes Including Trial. Transferred to Department 301, per Judge Woolard's recusal. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: CHRISTOPHER BAKKIE et al VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (BP) AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, June 26, 2009, line 2, DEFENDANT NOVELIS CORPORATION AMENDED MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Motion denied. Failure to shift burden of proof. Defendant purposefully excludes pages 77 through 79 of decedents deposition where he identifies defendant's product. Objections to Grotes declaration and David Bakkie's trial testimony sustained, all other objections overruled.=(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: PHIL HORNE VS. CARS DAWYDIAK INC. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Order Vacating And Setting Aside Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, June 26, 2009, line 4, DEFENDANT WALTER DAWYDIAK Motion For Order Vacating And Setting Aside Judgment. Motion denied. rulings.Case Title: ASIF AIVAZOV et al VS. JOYCE COX et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Rehearing Of Special Motion To Strike; Declarations Of Denis Stroud And Stas Portyansky
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, June 26, 2009, line 11, PLAINTIFF AIVAZOV, ASIF MINOR, PORTYANSKY, SABINA, STAS PORTYANSKY Motion For Rehearing Of Special Motion To Strike. Motion for rehearing or reconsideration is denied. Insufficient showing of new facts, circumstances or law to justify reconsidering the court's ruling pursuant to CCP section 1008. CCP section 657 is not applicable. =(302/CWW)
